## Meeting Purpose

[Catch up between Marcel Santilli and Tribe AI (Jaclyn Rice Nelson, Noah) to discuss Marcel's AI-powered content marketing services and potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/3yjxS1QBEtyMQogH2cvh41_9T5DPc1-A?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel has built successful AI workflows for content creation and SEO that have driven significant results for clients](https://fathom.video/share/3yjxS1QBEtyMQogH2cvh41_9T5DPc1-A?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [He is transitioning from his CMO role to focus full-time on his AI content agency, aiming for $1M+ run rate](https://fathom.video/share/3yjxS1QBEtyMQogH2cvh41_9T5DPc1-A?tab=summary&timestamp=959.0)
  - [There is mutual interest in exploring collaboration opportunities like workshops, enablement, or content services](https://fathom.video/share/3yjxS1QBEtyMQogH2cvh41_9T5DPc1-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's AI Content Agency

  - [After challenges at a previous role, Marcel focused on building AI workflows to automate content creation at low cost](https://fathom.video/share/3yjxS1QBEtyMQogH2cvh41_9T5DPc1-A?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [He hired offshore team members and trained them extensively to operate the AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/3yjxS1QBEtyMQogH2cvh41_9T5DPc1-A?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [The agency now delivers high-quality content at \~$0.10/word for clients like HomeBase](https://fathom.video/share/3yjxS1QBEtyMQogH2cvh41_9T5DPc1-A?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [Recent $300K deal with Ramp after impressing them with the AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/3yjxS1QBEtyMQogH2cvh41_9T5DPc1-A?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Aims to be transparent, give away knowledge via workshops to build trust](https://fathom.video/share/3yjxS1QBEtyMQogH2cvh41_9T5DPc1-A?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)

### Potential Collaboration with Tribe AI

  - [Tribe is hiring a head of marketing and struggling with pipeline generation](https://fathom.video/share/3yjxS1QBEtyMQogH2cvh41_9T5DPc1-A?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [Marcel's workshops could be a "front-end offer" to showcase capabilities to Tribe](https://fathom.video/share/3yjxS1QBEtyMQogH2cvh41_9T5DPc1-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1739.0)
  - [Opportunity for Marcel to provide AI-powered content services to Tribe](https://fathom.video/share/3yjxS1QBEtyMQogH2cvh41_9T5DPc1-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)
  - [Tribe could provide feedback to further develop Marcel's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/3yjxS1QBEtyMQogH2cvh41_9T5DPc1-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1865.0)

### Personal Backgrounds

  - [Marcel went through challenging personal circumstances (IVF journey, lost net worth)](https://fathom.video/share/3yjxS1QBEtyMQogH2cvh41_9T5DPc1-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [This drove him to build his own business with better culture/environment](https://fathom.video/share/3yjxS1QBEtyMQogH2cvh41_9T5DPc1-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
  - [Jaclyn and Noah relate to Marcel's experiences before starting Tribe](https://fathom.video/share/3yjxS1QBEtyMQogH2cvh41_9T5DPc1-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to add everyone to a Slack channel for continued discussions](https://fathom.video/share/3yjxS1QBEtyMQogH2cvh41_9T5DPc1-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1975.0)
  - [Share workshop recordings, standard offering details with Tribe](https://fathom.video/share/3yjxS1QBEtyMQogH2cvh41_9T5DPc1-A?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [Explore running a small "working session" to collaborate on an initial project](https://fathom.video/share/3yjxS1QBEtyMQogH2cvh41_9T5DPc1-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1962.0)
